profile.name: Iván Jiménez
profile.summary: Junior Cybersecurity Analyst with a software development background and specialized training in cybersecurity. Interested in network security, threat detection, incident response, and offensive security.

items.description: Forensic analysis exercises involving network captures, system evidence, malicious emails and structured technical reporting.

description: Contribute to software development, version maintenance and testing for industrial autonomous vehicle and inventory control systems.
Support technical troubleshooting, configuration management and validation of internal tools and workflows.
